of the 4 verification methods that comes with in Varga
Chatushta) to correct the timings.
Case 1:
For sure your birth star is Revati. The trine stars would be
Aslesha-Jyeshta-Revati. Asc x 81 should fall in any of these
3 stars is the condition. [i.e. Asc(Body) and Moon (Mind)
should make a combined effort for the birth to take place]
1) If the BT is 4h 48' 00" Kunda falls on Aslesha.
2) If the BT is 4h 54' 30" Kunda falls on Jyeshta
3) Ifthe BT is 5h 00' 52" Kunda falls on Revati.
1 and 2 falls outside the set limits. Discarding 1 and 2 we
conclude that if the BT is between 4h 55' 05" and Sh 00' 54" ,
then it is Sh 00' 52"
Case 2:
For sure your birth star is Revati. The trine stars would be
Aslesha-Jyeshta-Revati. Asc x 81 should fall in any of these
3 stars is the condition. [i.e. Asc(Body) and Moon (Mind)
